steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The colon introduces an explanation: members “not only contributed to its composition but also must be included in all performances.” The not only...but also construction emphasizes that their role is fundamental—essential in both creating and performing the piece.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Integral means essential and fundamental—exactly what the passage describes with its emphasis on their dual role in composition and mandatory presence in performances.

The other choices either minimize the role (tangential implies peripheral involvement), describe timing rather than importance (subsequent means later), or suggest comparison (analogous means similar), none of which fit the core claim.

This matches choice D — D is correct.
